FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct LayoutTransition

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

The whole authoring surface (interned POD). Channels × dynamics × size-mode × enter/exit compose orthogonally — translate / scale / rotate / opacity / clip-reveal all fall out, with no per-control special cases.

public readonly record struct LayoutTransition : IEquatable<LayoutTransition>
Implements
IEquatable<LayoutTransition>

Constructors

LayoutTransition(TransitionChannels, TransitionDynamics, SizeMode, EnterExit, EnterExit, ushort, TransitionDynamics?, float, SizeAnchor)

The whole authoring surface (interned POD). Channels × dynamics × size-mode × enter/exit compose orthogonally — translate / scale / rotate / opacity / clip-reveal all fall out, with no per-control special cases.

public LayoutTransition(TransitionChannels Channels, TransitionDynamics Dynamics = default, SizeMode Size = SizeMode.Auto, EnterExit Enter = default, EnterExit Exit = default, ushort CustomCurveId = 0, TransitionDynamics? ExitDynamics = null, float DelayMs = 0, SizeAnchor Anchor = SizeAnchor.Leading)

Parameters

Channels TransitionChannels
Dynamics TransitionDynamics
Size SizeMode
Enter EnterExit
Exit EnterExit
CustomCurveId ushort
ExitDynamics TransitionDynamics?
DelayMs float
Anchor SizeAnchor

Anchor 

public SizeAnchor Anchor { get; init; }

Property Value

SizeAnchor

AutoAll

The catch-all: position + size (Auto) + opacity. "Animate my layout, figure out the rest."

public static LayoutTransition AutoAll { get; }

Fade

Cross-fade only (no geometry).

SizeMode

Slide

Translate-only reflow (the default for reordered / moved items). Springs.

public static LayoutTransition Slide { get; }

Property Value

LayoutTransition

Methods

BoundsT(SizeMode)

Position + size, the size animated via size (Reveal = translate + clip, no distortion).

public static LayoutTransition BoundsT(SizeMode size)

Parameters

size SizeMode

Returns

LayoutTransition
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
